metrics.command_line: ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/2/d/1/dataset_2d17f1d7-3c9d-4b85-ba7a-b4ee9184d76a.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/1/e/8/dataset_1e81729b-b3a3-4caa-9830-806019d83475.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/galaxy/server/database/objects/_metadata_files/2/b/d/metadata_2bdbc3d4-04d1-4e58-b8c6-5da84c0f35d2.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
